description: US Senate Votes on Samuel Alito for the Supreme Court
skip_reason: The dataset has a binary outcome (Vote 0/1) and a treatment (Party R/D), but the only potential stratifying variable is StateOpinion which is a continuous numeric percentage — there is no categorical stratum column. The dataset would require arbitrary binning of a continuous variable to create strata, making it unsuitable for a clean Simpson's Paradox cell aggregation.
